ages.name: The Age of Air
ages.subtitle: Adzmyst · The Breath · Home
ages.riddle: The ox finds the door. The door reveals the cut. Strength opens passage into division — the first breath.
ages.lore: Wind made visible. Light made legible. The first language was not spoken — it was exhaled.

ages.name: The Age of Fire
ages.subtitle: Apollo · Prophecy · The Forge
ages.riddle: The mark precedes the making. The hand precedes the strength. What is completed must first be begun — and fire is the sign of that beginning.
ages.lore: Here the gods forge their names. Every prophecy is a scar carved in light.

ages.name: The Age of Earth
ages.subtitle: Gaia · Root · The Bone
ages.riddle: The pillar stands in the deep. The deep finds the door. What holds must also pass — roots are not walls.
ages.lore: Stone that breathes. Root that remembers. The earth does not forget what the sky names.

ages.name: The Age of Water
ages.subtitle: Divination · The Deep · Reflection
ages.riddle: The deep does not speak — it acts. The hand draws from chaos what the mark makes permanent. Draw the card. Read the tide.
ages.lore: Every card drawn here was always waiting. The water knew your question before you did.
